issues.title: Spring AI M4 Observability Issue
issues.body:
Hi All,

I have recently migrated from Spring AI M3 to M4.

In M3 the gen_ai metrics and traces were getting captured in M3 very well. But as soon as I migrated to M4 the gen_ai metrics are not getting captured although the traces are getting captured.

Can anyone please help me on the same

comments.body: Closing, please reopen if you are still having issues.
